painPoints.title: Salespeople deserve better
painPoints.subtitle: The reality of the field, told by those who live it every day.

painPoint1.quote: I feel like a secretary rather than a salesperson; admin takes 80% of my time when I should be closing.
painPoint1.author: Field sales rep, SMB

painPoint2.quote: My CRM is a graveyard of outdated data because the entry process is too complex.
painPoint2.author: Sales Director, mid-market

painPoint3.quote: They want me on the field, but they want real-time reports. It's physically impossible without an assistant.
painPoint3.author: Business Developer, startup

painPoint4.quote: I lose opportunities because my follow-up emails go out too late.
painPoint4.author: Account Executive, SaaS

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps. Zero apps to install.

step1.title: Sign up via WhatsApp
step1.description: Scan a QR code or send "Hi" to Jay. Connect your CRM in 2 minutes.

step2.title: Send a voice note
step2.description: Tell Jay about your meeting like you'd tell a colleague. Jay understands context and extracts actions.

step3.title: CRM updated
step3.description: Contacts, opportunities, notes, appointments — everything is created automatically in your CRM.

useCases.title: Use cases by industry
useCases.subtitle: Jay adapts to every sector. Discover the concrete benefits for your business.

hero.title: Jay adapts to your industry
hero.subtitle: Whatever your business, a voice message is all it takes to update your CRM. Discover the concrete benefits for your industry.

howItWorks.step1Desc: Send a WhatsApp voice note after your meeting, visit or call.
howItWorks.step2Desc: AI identifies contacts, actions and dates automatically.
howItWorks.step3Title: Your CRM is up to date
howItWorks.step3Desc: Notes, tasks and follow-ups created in your CRM in seconds.

cta.title: Your industry, your advantage
cta.subtitle: 50 free reports. No credit card. Compatible with all CRMs.

whyJay.title: Why choose Jay?
whyJay.point1Desc: A WhatsApp voice note is all it takes. No need to open the CRM, find the right contact, or fill in fields. Jay does it all automatically.
whyJay.point2Desc: Salesforce, HubSpot, Pipedrive, Zoho, Dynamics 365, Odoo, Teamleader... Jay integrates natively in 2 minutes.
whyJay.point3Desc: Jay recognizes your sector's technical vocabulary and structures data intelligently. No complex setup required.
whyJay.point4Desc: ISO 27001, GDPR, AI Act compliant. Encrypted data hosted in the EU. Voice notes are deleted after processing.

realestate.title: Real Estate
realestate.subtitle: Agencies, developers, independent agents
realestate.headline: Turn every visit into a concrete opportunity
realestate.adv1Label: No more manual data entry after each visit or call
realestate.adv2Label: Real-time visibility on every opportunity and follow-up
realestate.adv3Label: No prospect forgotten thanks to automatic reminders
realestate.quote: Before Jay, I spent my evenings filling in my CRM. Now, 30 seconds of voice note after a visit and it's done.
realestate.why1Desc: Leaving a property? 30 seconds of voice note is all it takes. No more scribbling notes or waiting until evening to update the CRM.
realestate.why2Desc: Jay automatically schedules follow-ups and revisits. Every potential buyer stays in your pipeline.
realestate.why3Title: Pipeline always up to date for the agency
realestate.why3Desc: Your agency manager sees every mandate and visit progress in real time without bothering you.
realestate.why4Desc: Jay understands EPC, exclusive mandate, offer, square footage and structures your data correctly.
realestate.scenario: Visit with Mr. Dupont for the 3-bed on Rue de la Paix. Very interested, wants to come back Monday with his wife. Budget confirmed 320K.

consulting.title: Consulting
consulting.subtitle: Consulting firms, freelancers, IT services
consulting.headline: Capture every client decision before it fades
consulting.adv1Label: Every decision and commitment captured instantly
consulting.adv2Label: Colleagues see CRM updates in real time
consulting.adv3Label: Structured reports generated in seconds after every meeting
consulting.quote: Between steering committees and workshops, I used to lose half the information. Jay captures everything while I move on to my next meeting.
consulting.why1Desc: Steering committee, workshop, client call: dictate your debrief and move on. Jay structures everything for the CRM.
consulting.why2Desc: Colleagues see decisions and commitments in real time. No more information lost between team members.
consulting.why3Desc: Jay automatically generates structured reports. No more hours spent writing at the end of the day.
consulting.why4Desc: Jay handles multiple client projects in parallel. Each voice note is linked to the right contact and project.
consulting.scenario: Carrefour project steering committee done. Lot 2 validated, next delivery April 15th. Call back IT director Thursday.

crm.f3: IT director GO, next step lot 3

construction.title: Construction
construction.subtitle: Construction companies, project managers, contractors
construction.headline: From the job site to CRM, without going to the office
construction.adv1Label: Update CRM from the construction site or the car
construction.adv2Label: Management tracks project progress without waiting
construction.adv3Label: Field teams finally use the CRM on a daily basis
construction.quote: My project managers never opened the CRM. With Jay, they dictate a voice note and everything is up to date.
construction.why1Title: From job site to CRM, no office needed
construction.why1Desc: Dictate from the construction site or the car. No PC required to update project progress.
construction.why2Desc: Your project managers will never open a CRM. But a WhatsApp voice note? They know how.
construction.why3Desc: Every site's progress syncs automatically. No more weekly status meetings needed.
construction.why4Desc: Jay understands shell, fit-out, lots, trades, handover and structures your site data.
construction.scenario: Shell completed on the Leblanc site. Plumber starts Monday, client meeting Friday. Send joinery quote.

energy.title: Energy
energy.subtitle: Suppliers, installers, energy auditors
energy.headline: Document every field audit in real time
energy.adv1Label: Technical data captured right from the field visit
energy.adv2Label: Rigorous follow-up on every prospect through long sales cycles
energy.adv3Label: Jay understands EPC, heat pumps, subsidies and structures the data
energy.quote: Jay understands my technical jargon. I dictate my findings and it structures everything for my CRM.
energy.why1Desc: Surface, orientation, consumption, subsidy eligibility: dictate your findings and Jay structures everything for the quote.
energy.why2Desc: In energy, a prospect can take months to decide. Jay ensures follow-up and reminders automatically.
energy.why3Desc: EPC, heat pumps, subsidies, kWp, self-consumption: Jay understands your technical jargon without configuration.
energy.why4Desc: All technical data is in the CRM right after the visit. Your office team can quote immediately.
energy.scenario: Audit at Mrs. Martin's. South-east roof 40sqm, consumption 8000 kWh, eligible for subsidies. Quote 12K with battery, call back in 3 days.

crm.f2: Call back in 3 days for quote

pharma.title: Pharmaceutical
pharma.subtitle: Laboratories, medical reps, wholesalers
pharma.headline: Every medical visit feeds your CRM automatically
pharma.adv1Label: No more visit reports at the end of the day
pharma.adv2Label: Complete history of every doctor/prescriber interaction
pharma.adv3Label: Structured data compliant with pharma traceability requirements
pharma.quote: I do 8 visits a day. Thanks to Jay, every report is in the CRM before I even arrive at the next doctor.
pharma.why1Desc: Between two doctors, a 30-second voice note is enough. The visit report is in the CRM before you arrive at the next one.
pharma.why2Desc: Every interaction is timestamped and structured. Complete history for your reporting obligations.
pharma.why3Desc: Jay tracks sample requests, doctor feedback and schedules revisits automatically.
pharma.why4Desc: Jay recognizes specialties, treatment names, dosages and structures data for your pharma CRM.
pharma.scenario: Visit to Dr Martin at Lyon Hospital. Interested in the new treatment, requesting samples. Revisit in 2 weeks.

agro.title: Food & Agriculture
agro.subtitle: Producers, distributors, field sales reps
agro.headline: From client rounds to CRM, without missing a beat
agro.adv1Label: Every client visit documented between two stops
agro.adv2Label: Orders and volumes captured and tracked automatically
agro.adv3Label: Promos, discounts and negotiated volumes visible to the entire team in real time
agro.quote: I visit 10 clients a day on my rounds. A voice note between each visit and my manager has full visibility.
agro.why1Desc: 10 clients a day? A voice note between each stop and every visit is in the CRM. Nothing is forgotten.
agro.why2Desc: Discounts, volumes, promos: Jay captures negotiated terms and makes them visible to the entire team.
agro.why3Desc: No more waiting until Friday for reporting. Your manager follows rounds in real time.
agro.why4Desc: Jay logs ordered quantities, references and schedules deliveries automatically.
agro.scenario: Visit to Biocoop Lille. Order 200 units granola, -5% negotiated for volume. Want to try the gluten-free range.

crm.f3: -5% negotiated on volume, GF range test

media.title: Media & Advertising
media.subtitle: Agencies, ad networks, producers
media.headline: Keep track of every advertiser relationship
media.adv1Label: Every advertiser exchange is captured and structured
media.adv2Label: Instant visibility on budgets and ongoing campaigns
media.adv3Label: No advertiser contract slips through the cracks thanks to automatic reminders
media.quote: With Jay, I dictate my lunch debrief and the deal is updated before I even get back to the office.
media.why1Desc: Lunch, call, trade show: dictate your debrief and Jay captures budgets, deadlines and key contacts.
media.why2Desc: Jay tracks every contract deadline and schedules reminders. No renewal slips through the cracks.
media.why3Desc: Your sales director sees ongoing deals, amounts and key dates in real time.
media.why4Desc: Jay links each voice note to the right advertiser and campaign. No more mix-ups between clients.
media.scenario: Lunch with L'Oréal. Q3 budget validated at 180K, digital + TV. Creative brief due by the 15th, call back Thursday.

industry.title: Industry & Manufacturing
industry.subtitle: Manufacturers, OEMs, subcontractors
industry.headline: Simplify your industrial project tracking
industry.adv1Label: Rigorous tracking of 6-18 month projects with zero effort
industry.adv2Label: All contacts and decisions for a project in one place
industry.adv3Label: Up-to-date data for accurate sales forecasts
industry.quote: On 12-month industrial projects with 5 stakeholders, Jay keeps me from losing track.
industry.why1Desc: Over long cycles with multiple stakeholders, Jay keeps track of every exchange and decision.
industry.why2Desc: Procurement, engineering, design office: Jay links each piece of info to the right contact in the project.
industry.why3Desc: With a CRM that's always up to date, your forecasts reflect reality. No more end-of-quarter surprises.
industry.why4Desc: Lots, technical specs, RFPs, bill of materials: Jay structures your project data accurately.
industry.scenario: Airbus technical meeting. Lot 3 validated at 250K. Procurement director wants final quote by the 20th. Next meeting in 3 weeks.

crm.f2: Final quote by 20th, meeting in 3 weeks

security.title: Security & compliance
security.subtitle: Your business data deserves the highest level of protection.

euHosting.title: EU Hosting
euHosting.description: Data stored in the European Union

faq1.question: How does Jay work?
faq1.answer: Jay is a voice assistant that works via WhatsApp. After your meeting, send a voice message to tell Jay what happened. Jay transcribes, analyzes and automatically updates your CRM with the summary, next steps and follow-ups to schedule.

faq2.question: Which CRMs are supported?
faq2.answer: Jay is compatible with Salesforce, HubSpot, Pipedrive, Zoho, Odoo, Dynamics 365 and TeamLeader. We regularly add new integrations. If your CRM is not listed, contact us.

faq3.question: Is my data secure?
faq3.answer: Absolutely. Jay is ISO 27001, GDPR and AI Act compliant. All data is encrypted and hosted in the European Union. Voice notes are processed and deleted after transcription. No data is used to train AI models.

faq4.question: How long does it take to get started?
faq4.answer: Less than 2 minutes. Connect via WhatsApp, link your CRM, and you're good to go. No app to install, no training needed.

faq5.question: Is the free plan really free?
faq5.answer: Yes, 100% free. 30 voice notes per month, no credit card required. You can use Jay as long as you want with the free plan.

faq6.question: Does Jay work in multiple languages?
faq6.answer: Yes. Jay understands and transcribes in French, English and Dutch. You can mix languages in the same voice note, Jay adapts automatically.

finalCTA.subtitle: Join the salespeople who save 2 hours per day with Jay. 50 free voice notes, no credit card.

creation.simpleExample: Create a contact for Marie Dupont, email marie.dupont@example.com, phone 06.12.34.56.78

bestPractices.title: Tips and Best Practices
do: Use full names to avoid duplicates
Always provide the email for better matching
Mention the company for professional context
dont: Create contacts with only a first name
Schedule meetings without specifying the contact
Mix multiple actions in one command

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.content:
[Société], a SAS (Simplified Joint-Stock Company) with a share capital of 85,000 euros, registered with the Lille Métropole Trade and Companies Register under SIREN number 992 172 866 (SIRET: 992 172 866 00012), with its registered office at 87 Rue du Fontenoy, 59100 Roubaix, France (hereinafter "Jay Assistant", "we", "our", "us"), is the data controller for your personal data.

We are committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, store and protect your personal information when you use our AI assistant service. By using Jay Assistant, you agree to the practices described in this privacy policy.

dataCollection.title: 2. Information We Collect
dataCollection.content: We collect information you provide directly (account, messages, third-party connections, preferences), automatically (usage data, IP, cookies, logs), and via third-party services (CRM, Google, WhatsApp).

dataUsage.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
dataUsage.content: We use your data to provide and improve our services, process your requests, manage your connections, personalize your experience, analyze usage, prevent fraud, comply with the law, and communicate with you.

dataSharing.title: 4. Sharing Your Information
dataSharing.content: We do not sell or rent your data. We only share with: integrated third-party services (Google, WhatsApp, CRM), providers (hosting, support), legal obligations, or to protect our rights.

security.title: 5. Data Security
security.content: We implement security measures: encryption, authentication, monitoring, staff training, backups.

retention.title: 6. Data Retention
retention.content: We retain your data as long as necessary to provide our services and comply with the law (account: active, messages: 12 months, connections: 6 months, billing: 7 years).

rights.title: 7. Your Rights
rights.content: Under GDPR, you can request access, rectification, erasure, portability, objection or restriction of your data. Contact: hey@jay-assistant.fr.

cookies.title: 8. Cookies and Similar Technologies
cookies.content: We use cookies to maintain your session, analyze usage, improve performance and personalize your experience. You can control cookies via your browser settings.

transfers.title: 9. International Transfers
transfers.content: Your data may be transferred outside the EU with appropriate safeguards.

changes.title: 10. Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We may update this policy. Major changes will be notified by email or in-app.

google.title: 11. Use of Google Workspace Data
google.content: Compliance with Google API Services User Data Policy. Google data is used only to provide expected features, never to train AI/ML models, nor shared with third parties except as functionally necessary.

contact.title: 12. Contact
contact.content: For any questions, contact us at hey@jay-assistant.fr, EuraTechnologies Blanchemaille - 87 Rue du Fontenoy, 59100 Roubaix, https://jay-assistant.fr.

legalInfo.title: 1. Legal Information
legalInfo.content:
[Société] is a SAS (Simplified Joint-Stock Company) with a share capital of 85,000 euros, registered with the Lille Métropole Trade and Companies Register under SIREN number 992 172 866 (head office SIRET: 992 172 866 00012).

Intra-community VAT number: FR84 992 172 866
APE code: 62.01Z – Computer programming
Date of incorporation: September 30, 2025

Registered office: 87 Rue du Fontenoy, 59100 Roubaix, France.

hosting.title: 3. Hosting
hosting.content:
The website jay-assistant.fr is hosted by Microsoft Azure (Azure Static Web Apps).
Microsoft France – 39 quai du Président Roosevelt, 92130 Issy-les-Moulineaux, France.

Application data is hosted by Supabase Inc. within the European Union (eu-west region).

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using Jay Assistant, you agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree, do not use the service.

service.title: 2. Service Description
service.content: Jay Assistant is an AI assistant allowing you to send messages, create events, integrate CRMs, process business cards, manage voice notes, and connect to third-party services.

account.title: 3. Registration and User Account
account.content: You must create an account with accurate information. You are responsible for the confidentiality and use of your account. Minimum age 18 (or parental consent between 13 and 17).

acceptableUse.title: 4. Acceptable Use
acceptableUse.content: Permitted uses: manage your communications, organize, automate, integrate tools. Prohibited uses: breaking the law, spam, IP infringement, harassment, malware, unauthorized access, unauthorized commercial use.

integrations.title: 5. Third-Party Integrations
integrations.content: The service integrates with Google Workspace, WhatsApp, CRM, etc. Use of these services is subject to their own terms.

ip.title: 6. Intellectual Property
ip.content: The service and its content are the property of Jay Assistant or its providers and protected by law. Limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license for service use.

billing.title: 7. Billing and Payment
billing.content: Service use may be subject to fees depending on the plan. Prices are shown on the website. Payment in advance, non-refundable except as required by law. Termination possible at any time, no refund for already billed periods.

liability.title: 8. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: Jay Assistant is not liable for indirect damages, loss of profits or data. Total liability is limited to the amount paid in the last 12 months.

warranty.title: 9. Warranties and Exclusions
warranty.content: The service is provided "as is". No guarantee of error-free or uninterrupted service. All implied warranties are excluded to the extent permitted by law.

indemnification.title: 10. Indemnification
indemnification.content: You agree to indemnify Jay Assistant for any claim related to your use of the service or violation of the terms.

termination.title: 11. Termination
termination.content: You may terminate at any time. We may suspend or terminate your access in case of violation. Upon termination, your right to use the service ceases immediately.

law.title: 12. Governing Law and Jurisdiction
law.content: Terms governed by French law. Disputes subject to French courts.

changes.title: 13. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We may change these terms at any time. Changes take effect upon publication. Continued use means acceptance.

contact.title: 14. Contact
contact.content: For any questions, contact us at hey@jay-assistant.fr, EuraTechnologies Blanchemaille - 87 Rue du Fontenoy, 59100 Roubaix, https://jay-assistant.fr.

creation.completeExample: Add an Odoo contact for Jean Martin, I spell J-E-A-N space M-A-R-T-I-N, email j.martin@techcorp.fr, phone 01.23.45.67.89, he works at TechCorp as sales director

do: Use full names to avoid duplicates

dont: Create contacts with only a first name

opportunity.example: "Add an opportunity for the CRM project, amount twenty-five thousand euros, contact Marie Dupont, qualification stage"

integrations.title: CRM Guide
integrations.subtitle: Configuration and usage of all supported CRMs

howWorks.question: How does Jay understand my messages?
howWorks.answer: Jay uses advanced artificial intelligence to analyze your voice and text messages. It recognizes intentions, extracts important information (names, amounts, dates) and automatically executes actions in your CRMs.

security.question: Is my data secure?
security.answer: Absolutely. Jay uses end-to-end encryption for all communications. Your CRM data stays in your systems, Jay only facilitates interactions via secure APIs.

cancelAction.question: Can I cancel an action by mistake?
cancelAction.answer: Jay always confirms important actions before executing them. If an error occurs, you can always correct it directly in your CRM or ask Jay to modify/delete via a new message.

offline.question: Does Jay work offline?
offline.answer: No, Jay requires an internet connection to function as it processes your messages via AI and syncs with your CRMs in real time. However, actions are very fast, usually within seconds.

pricing.question: How much does Jay cost?
pricing.answer: Jay offers several subscription plans according to your needs. Check the "Subscription" tab in your dashboard to see current details and pricing.

needHelp.title: Need additional help?
needHelp.description: Our support team is available to guide you in using Jay.

hero.subtitle: Stop typing in CRM. Send a WhatsApp voice note and Jay updates Zoho CRM automatically — contacts, deals, notes, tasks, quotes.
hero.audience: Built for field sales reps and account managers across Europe.

features.title: Everything Jay does in Zoho CRM
features.subtitle: From a single voice note, Jay handles the messy parts of your CRM so you can focus on closing.

voice.title: Voice-to-CRM automation
voice.description: Send a WhatsApp voice note in French, Dutch or English — Jay creates Contacts, Accounts, Deals, Notes, Tasks, Quotes and even Products in Zoho CRM. Records are matched by name, deduplicated, and confirmed in WhatsApp with a direct Zoho link.

debrief.title: Auto-detected post-meeting debrief
debrief.description: Jay detects when your meeting ends, pings you on WhatsApp, captures your voice debrief, and writes everything back to Zoho CRM: Notes on the right Contact, follow-up Tasks with due dates, Deal stage updates, new contacts created.

brief.title: Pre-meeting briefs with DISC insights
brief.description: Before every appointment, Jay sends a WhatsApp brief with the full Zoho CRM context — Contact history, last Notes, open Deals, recent Activities — plus a DISC personality analysis to help you adapt your pitch.

quotes.title: Localized Quote & Product management
quotes.description: Dictate a Quote in any language and Jay handles the rest: auto-creates the Product in your Zoho catalog if missing, links Contact and Account, applies localized naming (Devis / Offerte / Quote) and respects your tax settings.

aboutZoho.title: What is Zoho CRM?
aboutZoho.body: Zoho CRM is one of the world's most trusted CRM platforms, used by hundreds of thousands of businesses to manage leads, contacts, deals, and customer relationships at scale. Jay extends Zoho CRM with a voice-first interface on WhatsApp — so your reps update the CRM from the road, between meetings, without ever opening a laptop.

howItWorks.title: Get started in 3 minutes
howItWorks.subtitle: Five steps from sign up to your first voice-driven update in Zoho CRM.

step1.title: Sign up to Jay
step1.description: Create your free Jay account — no credit card required.

step2.title: Connect Zoho CRM
step2.description: From your Jay dashboard, open the Integrations page and click Connect Zoho CRM. Authorize Jay via Zoho's OAuth flow.

step3.title: Link your WhatsApp
step3.description: Connect the WhatsApp number you use for business in one click. Jay replies on this number for every voice note.

step4.title: Send your first voice note
step4.description: Describe what just happened with a prospect — Jay detects all CRM actions automatically.

step5.title: Validate and you're done
step5.description: Jay shows the detected actions. Tap Validate — your records appear instantly in Zoho CRM, fully linked together.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when your team grows. All plans include the Zoho CRM integration.
pricing.footer: Annual billing offers 20% discount. Custom Enterprise plans available on request.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: For solo sales reps who want to update Zoho CRM from WhatsApp.

features.0: Voice-to-CRM automation (Contacts, Deals, Notes, Tasks, Quotes)

features.1: Pre-meeting briefs with DISC personality insights

finalCta.title: Stop typing in CRM. Just talk to Jay.
finalCta.subtitle: Start your free trial today and update your Zoho CRM from a WhatsApp voice note in under 3 minutes.
finalCta.note: No credit card required · Connect Zoho CRM in 1 click
